snippet.title: GTA 5 LIVE | Train vs 100 Luxury Cars 😱🔥 कौन बचेगा?
snippet.description:
आज की इस 🔴 LIVE स्ट्रीम में हम Grand Theft Auto V के अंदर एक जबरदस्त एक्सपेरिमेंट करने वाले हैं!

🚗💥 100 लग्ज़री गाड़ियों को रेलवे ट्रैक पर खड़ा किया गया है
🚆 और सामने से आ रही है फुल स्पीड ट्रेन!

😱 क्या ये महंगी गाड़ियाँ ट्रेन को रोक पाएंगी?
या फिर सब कुछ हो जाएगा चकनाचूर?

👉 LIVE में जुड़ो और देखो कौन सी कार सबसे ज्यादा स्ट्रॉन्ग है!

🔥 Don’t forget to LIKE 👍 SHARE 📲 and SUBSCRIBE ❤️

snippet.title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai |Varun,Mrunal,Pooja| In Cinemas 5th June
snippet.description:
🔥 Get ready to groove to the ultimate dance song of the year — Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go! 💃✨
From the much-awaited Bollywood entertainer Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, this electrifying track brings back the iconic 90s vibe with a fresh party twist! 🎶❤️

With peppy beats, colorful energy, and vocals that will make you hit repeat, this song is all set to rule your playlists and dance floors! 🕺🔥

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Releasing In Cinemas Worldwide on 5th June 2026

Song Credits : 
Song Title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go!
Music Composer: Akshay & IP
Additional Lyrics: IP Singh
Singers: IP Singh, Jonita Gandhi, Asees Kaur, Sudhir Yaduvanshi, Anuradha Sriram
Music Produced & Arranged: Akshay Raheja, Abhishek Singh
Guitars: Chaitanya Bhaidkar
Mix & Master: Abhishek Ghatak
Original Music: Anu Malik
Original Lyrics: Sameer Anjaan
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza

Movie Details: 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy
Co-Producer: Gaurav Bose (Maximilian Films UK)
DOP: Ayananka Bose
Story & Screenplay Writer: Yunus Sajawal
Dialogue Writer: Farhad Samji
Music: White Noise Collectives, Tanishk Bagchi, Rony Ajnali, Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), Javed - Mohsin, Akshay & IP
Lyrics: Vayu, Jairaj, Mohsin Shaikh, Rony Ajnali & Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), IP Singh
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza, Bosco Martis, Vijay Ganguly
Editor: Ritesh Soni
Head Of Production: Varsha Taurani
Production Designer: Late Rajat Poddar & Parijat Poddar
Action Director: Sunil Rodrigues

Sound Recording & Sound Design:  Parikshit Lavani & Kunal Mehhta (CSD Studio)
Background Score Raju Singh
Costume Designer Aki Narula, Samidha Wangnoo
Associate Producer Prakash Talreja
Executive Producer Sushil Tirwadkar
Line Producer Sudipto (Sid) Sarkar (UK)
Associate Director Aakar Kauoshik
Associate Editor: Sanket Rajadhyaksha
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (Cas)
Casting Director Mukesh Chhabra (Csa) & Rachita Kapoor (UK)
Di Studio : Redefine
Di Colourist Ashirwad Hadkar (Isc)
Vfx Do It Creative Ltd (UK)
Post Producer Murli Shah
Publicity Design: Parass Kanani (  House Of AWE)
Media Consultant : Nilufer Qureshi (Hype)

Marketing Consultant:  Yash Suchak & Suraj Rao (Grey Alchemy)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
Visual Promotions Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)
UK Production Maximilian Films Ltd. 

Lyrics : 
Chunari-Chunari
 
Saari Raen Din
Saara Chaen Mera
Hosh Tabiyat Lutt Ke Lae Gayi,
 
Udti Jaaye Banke Patang,
Kar Mujhko Tang Ye Kya Hai Keh Gayi,
 
Lehraaye Besharmi Se
Tadpaaye Berehmi Se
Chhoo Loon Tu Kehde Jo Zaraa.
 
Aaja Na Chhoo Le Meri Chunari Sanam
Kuchh Na Main Bolun Tujhey Meri Qasam.
 
Aaya Deewaana Darr Pe Tere
Tere Bin Kya Karoon Bataa De Bereham.
 
Mhare Dil Mein Bajee Pichkari,
Rangi Main Poori Thaari Sajna,
Teri Choonar Manay Samjhaa Ri,
Ke Ho Gi Tu Hai Mhaari Sajnaa.

snippet.title: The Pyramid Scheme - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
The Pyramid Scheme Official Trailer 
Starring Paramvir Cheema, Ranvir Shorey, Annjan Srivastav, Shekhar Suman, Ashish Raghav, Alfiya Jafri, Akhilendra Mishra, Smita Bansal, Indresh Malik, Sushant Singh
Directors: Ashish R Shukla, Shreyansh Pandey
Writers: Akshendra Mishra
Production Company: The Viral Fever

Official Release Date - June 5, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
The Pyramid Scheme follows the story of Goldy, an ambitious but impatient young man, whose quest to get rich through a pyramid marketing business spirals into a rollercoaster of chaos - risking not just his future, but also the love and trust of his close-knit joint family.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

Song Credits:
🎵 Song Title: Nas Nas Kyu Dukhei (नस नस क्यों दूखै)

Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei

snippet.title: Khesari Lal Yadav का #रंगदारी_गाना | Ahir Ke Dimag | Shilpi Raj | Kajal Kashyap | Bhojpuri Song 2026
snippet.description:
Khesari Lal Yadav new song Ahir Ke Dimag /अहीर के दिमाग , Shilpi Raj Ft. Kajal Kashyap ka ye naya bhojpuri gana aapke dil ko touch kar jayega. Rangdaari Bhojpuri new song jiska sabhi Khesari Army ko intezaar tha aa gaya ab .Khesari Lal Yadav aur Kajal Kashyap ki bhojpuri jodi  song aap sabhi ke dil pe raj karega.  
🔥khesari lal yadav new song 2026 ke Rangdaari Song… आ गईल गर्मी की गर्मी बढ़ाये! 🔥

Reel Banaye : 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/2002452273685032?igsh=MW8zZDVpdmMzbXh3cQ==


SINGERS: KHESARI LAL YADAV & SHILPI RAJ
FEAT.  : KAJAL KASHYAP 
MUSIC :KANHA SINGH
LYRICS: KRISHNA BEDARDI
Video by - Wailens Production 
Director - Pavan Pal 
Editor - Angad Pal 
Choriyographer- Kuldeep Vishakha 
DOP - Dileep Chaurasiya 
  Makup  - Atish Akela 
Hair - Vikash Kumar Team 
Di - Rohit Singh 
Light - Ganpati Light 
Art  - Babbu Art

F, काहे देखावे ल नोट बाबू,
छुवे ल अंगूरी से होठ बाबू,,
Laver हमार अपराधी ह,
मारदिही गोली देखी छोट बाबू,,
M, जतीय ब्रांड हावे कालिहे पाता केहू बाकी ना एह परिचे से, अहीर के दिमाग जाला फिर त फार देला बिचे से,,
 
 
M, छत्रि के छव बुद्धि पंडी जी के बारह अहीर के एके बुद्धि पटकी के मार,
F, देखी कच्चा कली बनतार खली ये बाबू हमरो वाला हटे बाहुबलि,,
M, होई कतल लगे बावे पिस्टल केहू फल लेके जाई ना बगीचे से,,
 
 
M, मान सम्मान खातिर रहेला जूनून मे,
यार खातिर यारी बा गद्दारी नइखे खून मे ,,

F,, का जादू कइल हम सवर गइनी,
ये जादो जी तोहरा प मर गइनी,,
M, कहे बेदर्दी औरी खेसारी प्यारी वार नाही करे ला पीछे से,

snippet.title: Maa Inti Bangaaram - Official Trailer | Samantha | Raj Nidimoru | Nandini Reddy | Santhosh Narayanan
snippet.description:
Presenting you the Official Teaser Trailer of "Maa Inti Bangaram" Starring Samantha  & Others, Created by: Raj Nidimoru Directed by BV Nandini Reddy, Produced by Tralala Moving Pictures, Music Composed by Santhosh Narayanan.

This GOLD is BLOODY BOLD 💥💥
Coming to Theatres June 19 2026 

Created by: Raj Nidimoru
Directed by: BV Nandini Reddy
Produced by: Tralala Moving Pictures
Producers: Raj Nidimoru, Samantha, Himank Reddy Duvvuru
Director of Photography: Om Prakash ISC

snippet.title: GOVERNOR | Official Trailer | Manoj Bajpayee | Vipul Amrutlal Shah |Chinmay Mandlekar |Aashin A Shah
snippet.description:
“If I fail... India fails.”

Manoj Bajpayee brings to life the untold story of the brave unsung hero who saved India from bankruptcy.

Witness GOVERNOR.
Trailer Out Now.
In cinemas on 12th June, 2026.

Starring: Manoj Bajpayee, Adah Sharma, Noushad Mohamed Kunju

Production company :
Sunshine Pictures

Directed by: Chinmay D Mandlekar
Produced by: Vipul Amrutlal Shah
Co-Produced by: Aashin A. Shah, Ravichand Nallappa

Lyrics: Javed Akhtar
Music By: Amit Trivedi
Music On: Zee Music

te.title: నేను ఫోర్జా హొరైజన్ 6 లో పగాని హుయారా BC కొన్నాను 🤑| ఖరీదైనది
te.description:
కొత్త వీడియోల కోసం దయచేసి సబ్స్క్రైబ్ చేయండి

రోబ్లాక్స్ వీడియోల కోసం @OPGamerBlox కు సబ్స్క్రైబ్ చేయండి ❤️

🤗 నన్ను ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్‌లో అనుసరించండి: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

మీకు ఈ వీడియో నచ్చిందని ఆశిస్తున్నాను, నచ్చితే దయచేసి వీడియోను లైక్ చేసి, షేర్ చేయండి.

1976 కాపీరైట్ చట్టంలోని సెక్షన్ 107 ప్రకారం, విమర్శ, వ్యాఖ్య, వార్తా నివేదన, బోధన, పాండిత్యం, విద్య మరియు పరిశోధన వంటి ప్రయోజనాల కోసం "న్యాయమైన ఉపయోగం" అనుమతించబడుతుంది.

న్యాయమైన ఉపయోగం అనేది కాపీరైట్ చట్టాల ద్వారా అనుమతించబడిన ఒక ఉపయోగం, లేకపోతే అది ఉల్లంఘన కావచ్చు.

pa.description:
ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਨਵੇਂ ਵੀਡੀਓਜ਼ ਲਈ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰੋ
ਰੋਬਲੋਕਸ ਵੀਡੀਓਜ਼ ਲਈ @OPGamerBlox ਨੂੰ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰੋ ❤️

🤗 ਇੰਸਟਾਗ੍ਰਾਮ 'ਤੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਾਲਣ ਕਰੋ: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/ 

ਮੈਨੂੰ ਉਮੀਦ ਹੈ ਕਿ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਪਸੰਦ ਆਇਆ ਹੋਵੇਗਾ, ਤਾਂ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਨੂੰ ਲਾਈਕ ਅਤੇ ਸ਼ੇਅਰ ਕਰੋ। 

ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਅਸਵੀਕਾਰਨ 1976 ਦੇ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਐਕਟ ਦੀ ਧਾਰਾ 107 ਦੇ ਤਹਿਤ, ਆਲੋਚਨਾ, ਟਿੱਪਣੀ, ਖ਼ਬਰਾਂ ਦੀ ਰਿਪੋਰਟਿੰਗ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ, ਸਕਾਲਰਸ਼ਿਪ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ ਅਤੇ ਖੋਜ ਵਰਗੇ ਉਦੇਸ਼ਾਂ ਲਈ "ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ" ਦੀ ਆਗਿਆ ਹੈ।

ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਕਾਨੂੰਨਾਂ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਆਗਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਾਪਤ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਹੋਰ ਉਲੰਘਣਾ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੀ ਹੈ।

ta.title: FORZA HORIZON 6-இல் PAGANI HUAYRA BC வாங்கினேன் 🤑 | விலையுயர்ந்தது
ta.description:
புதிய வீடியோக்களுக்கு சப்ஸ்கிரைப் செய்யுங்கள்
ரோப்லாக்ஸ் வீடியோக்களுக்கு @OPGamerBlox-ஐ சப்ஸ்கிரைப் செய்யுங்கள் ❤️

🤗 இன்ஸ்டாகிராமில் என்னைப் பின்தொடருங்கள்: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

இந்த வீடியோ உங்களுக்குப் பிடித்திருக்கும் என்று நம்புகிறேன். பிடித்திருந்தால், தயவுசெய்து லைக் செய்து பகிருங்கள்.

1976 ஆம் ஆண்டின் பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டத்தின் பிரிவு 107-இன் கீழ் பதிப்புரிமை மறுப்புரை: விமர்சனம், கருத்துரை, செய்தி அறிக்கை, கற்பித்தல், கல்வி, ஆராய்ச்சி போன்ற நோக்கங்களுக்காக "நியாயமான பயன்பாட்டிற்கு" அனுமதி வழங்கப்படுகிறது.

நியாயமான பயன்பாடு என்பது பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டங்களால் அனுமதிக்கப்பட்ட ஒரு பயன்பாடாகும், இல்லையெனில் அது மீறலாகக் கருதப்படலாம்.

Tis I do?! The critically-acclaimed ‘Enola Holmes’ franchise has returned, taking Enola far from London, where personal and professional dreams collide on a case more tangled and treacherous than any she has faced before. snippet.title: Disclosure Day | Final Trailer
snippet.description:
Believe it when you see it. Get tickets now. Disclosure Day only in theaters June 12.
______
If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to eight billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar® winner Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025’s Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Award® nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industry’s most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award® winner, including Oscars® for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindler’s List, which received a total of seven Oscars®, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award® nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/disclosuredayfilm/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/disclosureday/

X: https://www.twitter.com/disclosureday
Hashtag: #disclosureday

Presenting the Trailer of Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai starring Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur & Pooja Hegde, directed by David Dhawan.
A perfect mix of comedy, love, confusion & family drama awaits you on the big screen! ❤️🔥

Tips Films Ltd Presents

snippet.title: Ghis Ghis Ghis | Welcome to the Jungle | Akshay Kumar, Akshara Singh | Vikram Montrose | 26th June
snippet.description:
Presenting the ultimate collaboration of the year, Bollywood Khiladi Akshay Kumar teams up with the undisputed queen of Bhojpuri cinema, Akshara Singh. 🔥🎶 Ghis Ghis Ghis from 'Welcome to the Jungle' sung by Vikram Montrose and Supriya Pathak, with catchy lyrics by Abhinav Shekhar, is not just a song; it’s a high-octane Bollywood-Bhojpuri celebration packed with desi swag, electrifying energy, and nonstop entertainment.

#GhisGhisGhis #AkshayKumar #AksharaSingh #WelcomeToTheJungle #BollywoodSong #BollywoodDanceSong #BhojpuriSong #BhojpuriDanceSong #PartySong #DanceSong #BollywoodNewSong #NewSong

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali

A.A. Nadiadwala, Cape of Good Films & Star Studio18 present 
In association with Seeta Films & Rakesh Dang 
A Base Industries Group Production 
Produced by Firoz  A.  Nadiadwallah, Rakesh Dang & Vedant Vikaas Baali

Ghis ghis ghis ghis ghis 
Ghis ghis ghis
Ae Raja sabun se
Ae Raja
Ae Raja

Bahiya mein bharke peesela chakki
Honthva pe kaate jaise madhumakkhi
Tani paas aava naughty girl
Bahiya mein bharke peeseni chakki
Honthva pe kaatab jaise madhumakkhi

Meetha khilayi ke
Aadat lagayi ke
Bhag na jahiyan raja ji

Hamar laagal ba dilva
Arre laga ba kaare gori

Hamar laagal ba dilva playboy se

Re pithiya dabaye rani chadh chadh ke
Re pithiya dabaye rani chadh chadh ke
Mathva pe hathva se ghis ke sabuniya
Ragde jawaani pura bhar bhar ke

Ghis ghis ghis arre ghisa rani

Re pithiya dabaye rani chadh chadh ke

Kohni gadaye jab bada maza aaye
Chalke jawani pura bhar bhar ke

Bhag na jahiyan raja ji

Arre laga ba kaare gori

Hamar laagal ba dilva playboy se
Ragad ke nehela deb sabun se
Tohar lagal ba dilva playboy se
Ragad ke nehela de tu sabun se
Arre poora chamka debe kaa re

snippet.title: Franklin & Shinchan Become FISHERMAN 😱🦈 | GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
In this hilarious GTA 5 Malayalam Story, Franklin and Shinchan leave city life behind and become full-time fishermen! From catching giant fishes in dangerous lakes to opening their own busy fish stall in Los Santos, things quickly turn crazy and funny. 😂🔥
Will Franklin and Shinchan become the biggest fish sellers in GTA 5? Or will their new business turn into total chaos? Watch till the end for funny moments, unexpected adventures, shark attacks, and massive fish catches! 🦈🚤
🎮 GTA 5 Malayalam Story Video by POKKIRI YT 
💬  by Basith
✨ Funny, emotional, and exciting GTA 5 story perfect for kids and family viewers!

snippet.title: Govinda Namalu Telugu🙏| గోవింద నామాలు | Lord Balaji | Saturday Special Venkateswara Swamy Songs
snippet.description:
Govinda Namalu Telugu🙏| గోవింద నామాలు | Lord Balaji | Saturday Special Venkateswara Swamy Songs 


Chant the sacred Govinda Namalu in Telugu and experience the divine blessings of Lord Venkateswara Swamy (Balaji). These powerful chants glorify Lord Govinda, the protector and savior of devotees, and are widely recited with deep faith and devotion.

Listening to Govinda Namalu fills your heart with peace, devotion, and spiritual strength. It is especially powerful on Saturdays, bringing divine grace, removing obstacles, and attracting prosperity and happiness.


#GovindaNamalu #VenkateswaraSwamySongs #LordBalaji #DevotionalSongs #GovindaGovinda   


Govinda Namalu Telugu, Lord Venkateswara Swamy Songs, Govinda Hari Govinda, Lord Balaji Songs, God Songs, Tirupati Balaji Songs, Govinda Govinda, Venkateswara Bhakti Songs, Govinda Namalu, Saturday Special Songs, Telugu Devotional Songs, Bhakti Songs Telugu, Devotional Songs Telugu, God Songs Telugu, Venkateswara Suprabhatam, Srinivasa Govinda, Bhakti Songs, Lord Venkateswara, Balaji Songs

snippet.title: வைகாசி விசாகம் 2026 | முருகன் அருள்பாடல்கள் | Vaikasi Visakam Special Murugan Songs 🔱
snippet.description:
Experience the divine grace of Lord Murugan through “Sri Shanmukha Sundara Stotram”, a powerful Tamil Murugan devotional song filled with spiritual energy, devotion, and peace. 🙏

Vaikasi Visakam is celebrated as the sacred birth festival of Lord Murugan, and this special devotional presentation brings together powerful Murugan stotram, Tamil bhakti songs, and soulful spiritual vibrations for every devotee. 

🔱 வைகாசி விசாகம் 2026 சிறப்பு முருகன் பக்தி பாடல்கள் 🔱
“ஸ்ரீ சண்முக சுந்தர ஸ்தோத்திரம்” மூலம் அருளும் ஆனந்தமும் நிறைந்த முருகப் பக்தி அனுபவத்தை உணருங்கள். 🙏
இந்த Vaikasi Visakam Special பாடல் தொகுப்பில் முருகன் ஸ்தோத்திரம், தமிழ் பக்தி பாடல்கள், அரோகரா முருகா நாமங்கள் மற்றும் ஆன்மிக அதிர்வுகள் இணைந்துள்ளன.

வைகாசி விசாகம் என்பது Lord Murugan அவர்களின் அவதார திருநாளாக கொண்டாடப்படும் புனித நாள். இந்த முருகன் devotional songs உங்கள் மனதில் அமைதியும் தைரியமும் பக்தியையும் நிரப்பட்டும். 

🙏 அரோகரா! வெற்றிவேல் முருகனுக்கு அரோகரா!
இந்த தமிழ் devotional பாடலை கேட்டு உங்கள் குடும்பத்தாருடனும் நண்பர்களுடனும் பகிர்ந்து கொள்ளுங்கள்.

#vaikasivisakam #murugansongs #murugandevotionalsongs #ShanmukhaStotram #muruga #tamildevotionalsongs #murugan #muruganbhakti #tamilbhaktisongs #velmurugan #kandasashti #spiritualtamil #devotionalmusic #tamilmurugansongs

snippet.title: Ame Balunga Toka | ଆମେ ବାଳୁଙ୍ଗା ଟୋକା | Chhaki Suna | Anubhav Mohanty | Papu Pom Pom | This Raja
snippet.description:
#AmaraMuzikOdia #AmeBalungaToka #BalungaToka #ChhakiSuna #odiasong #amaramuzik #odiamovie #odiamusic #odiadancesong #thisraja 

Presenting the most awaited anthem of the year from the movie “Chhaki Suna” — “Ame Balunga Toka” 🎶🔥
In the powerful voice of Superstar Anubhav Mohanty, this track is all set to rule every playlist and every heart! ❤️⚡ Get ready for the madness, the swag & the vibe of the year!!

Song Credits:
Singer: Anubhav Mohanty , Papu Pom Pom
Lyricist: Pramod Parida 
Music Director: Baidyanath Dash
Original Lyricist: Dr.Nirmal Nayak
Original Music Director: Abhijit Majumdar
Live dhol Nishan tasa - Pramod , Manish 
Live Rhythm Recorded in - Smruti Studio
Live Duff and Percussions - Anshu 
Keys Programming- Anshu
Electronic Drums - Anshu
Mix and Master - Milan Dash

Listen to 'Ame Balunga Toka' on your favourite streaming platform
http://tinysync.in/I_n4s5eb99M

To set the song as your caller tune : Ame Balunga Toka
Airtel users can set your caller tunes from Wynk app
Jio users can set the caller tunes from JioSaavn
Vodafone users can set the callertune from Vi app
Bsnl Users: SMS BT 16607455 to 56700

To set the song as your caller tune : Jigarwala Ame Balunga Toka
Airtel users can set your caller tunes from Wynk app
Jio users can set the caller tunes from JioSaavn
Vodafone users can set the callertune from Vi app
Bsnl Users: SMS BT 16607456 to 56700

Lyrics:
heyi ho madamoo 
akhire tamara karina kajala 
otha re golapa jhada
lachkeyi anta chaligale tame 
hrutpinda re kara mada 
tama chinichatria dhanga 
pura daula daula anga 
tamaku dekhiki hala hala huye
odisha paschimabanga 
thare nirolare kebe asa
khelibaku tike mana ..
ame tanu thibu chaki chaki chaki 
tame pakeyiba suna ...
haan kahi dia khusi hoyi jibu ,
na kahi dele dhaka 
tamapayi ame suna pilla guda heyi galuni 
balunga ... balunga ... balunga ....
aji dina ta bhala re katu .. kaliki ku kia pachare ..
bata re hati jemiti chalu kukura bhukibe hazare ..
hey .. aji dina ta bhala re katu .. kaliki ku kia pachare ..
bata re hati jemiti chalu kukura bhukibe hazare ..
ame ta ama mana ra arja ...
amara party singha kalija
ama sanga re lagiba jiye ..
chati debu tari bheja ..
katha re katha 
ame re sabu kama re chokha ..
balunga .. balunga ... balunga ..
hey ame balunga toka ..
haan balunga toka ... 
hey ame balunga toka ..
haan balunga toka ...
hey ame balunga toka ..
haan balunga toka ...
balunga toka... allo allo 
tu para balunga toka ..
balunga toka.. allo allo 
tu para balunga toka ..
haan bajiba ... 
ame sabuthu sudhara pilla
jhatia nuhey jiggara bala ..
jouthi ame chida hau ..
seyithi khela jameyi dau ..
chahi thibe samna bala ..
jahaku thare dil dabu ..
tari payi jaan dabu .. 
dabu nahi jama dhilaa....
ame ta toka jiddia bhari ..
jatake nahi chori ki nari ..
bhulbhal kariba jiye ....
aga pacha dabu kori ..
jemiti dhana ball paka 
maribu chakkaaa..
balunga .. balunga ... balunga ..
hey ame balunga toka ..
haan balunga toka ... 
hey ame balunga toka ..
haan balunga toka ...
hey ame balunga toka ..
balunga toka ... balunga toka 
bobal haba ... dhama haba  .. jhakash haba 
jadi ama batare jiba ama katha re heba
tike benga kariba .. maa raan..
pura jatera heyi jiba ..
chal penkali baja ..
ama pakahare nathau dhana ..
ama pakahare achi ta mana..
jahabi kahu munha re kahu ..
abujha hele pithi re dau...
ama prati sabadhana ..
jou jhia ta line dela ... 
unlimited karibu gela ..
khela heba chaki suna..
are jou jhia ta line dela ... 
unlimited karibu gela ..
khela heba chaki suna..
khela ta amara alga tike ..
pathare nuhe sathare ok ..
munda utheyi chalibu bata ..
pachare jaha kuhantu loke ..
apata sepata hele dhana dabuni phanka ..
balunga .. abe balunga ..ame balunga toka ..
balunga .. balunga ... balunga .. 
hey ame balunga toka ..
 balunga toka ..
balunga toka .. 
idang.. bichuati ..gotrasya ..
bayidanka bramha kandena..
aaa ... balungaya .. swahaa..
swahaaa...

snippet.title: Koi Hame Pyaar Krega – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Koi Hame Pyaar Krega – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Koi hame pyaar krega…
ye soch kar hi
dil muskura deta hai.

Hum kaun se
kisi ke liye khaas hain…
phir bhi na jaane kyun
dil umeed karta hai.

Kabhi to koi hoga
jo hume samjhega…
hamari khamoshi ko bhi
mehsoos karega.

“Koi Hame Pyaar Krega”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo bahut tootne ke baad bhi
mohabbat par yakeen rakhta hai.

Is gaane mein
umeed bhi hai,
tanhai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

shayad kisi din
koi hume bhi apna kahe…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ke pyaar ka
intezaar kiya ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Romantic • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

localized.title: Koi Hame Pyaar Krega – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
localized.description:
Koi Hame Pyaar Krega – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Koi hame pyaar krega…
ye soch kar hi
dil muskura deta hai.

Hum kaun se
kisi ke liye khaas hain…
phir bhi na jaane kyun
dil umeed karta hai.

Kabhi to koi hoga
jo hume samjhega…
hamari khamoshi ko bhi
mehsoos karega.

“Koi Hame Pyaar Krega”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo bahut tootne ke baad bhi
mohabbat par yakeen rakhta hai.

Is gaane mein
umeed bhi hai,
tanhai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

shayad kisi din
koi hume bhi apna kahe…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ke pyaar ka
intezaar kiya ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Romantic • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

snippet.title: श्री राम की गली में तुम जाना | Shri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana | Nachte Milenge Hanumana
snippet.description:
Shri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana Wahan Nachte Milenge Hanumana | Hanuman Bhajan for Energy, Bhakti & Positivity | Sanatan Music

“Shri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana Wahan Nachte Milenge Hanumana” is a joyful and powerful Hanuman bhajan filled with Ram bhakti, celebration, and devotional energy. This song beautifully shows the deep love of Hanuman ji for Shri Ram — where the name of Ram is sung, Hanuman is always present with devotion, strength, and divine joy.

This Hanuman bhajan is perfect for morning devotion, Tuesday/Saturday puja, Ram bhakti gatherings, satsang, festive playlists, workout motivation, or anytime you want to fill your space with high-energy bhakti.

✨ Why listen to this Hanuman bhajan:
• Brings energetic Ram bhakti and powerful devotional vibes
• Perfect for Tuesday/Saturday puja, satsang, and daily devotion
• Helps build courage, positivity, and inner strength
• Creates an uplifting atmosphere filled with Hanuman ji’s protection and grace

🎧 Play it loud, chant along, and feel the energy — wherever Shri Ram’s name is remembered, Hanuman ji’s devotion comes alive.
🙏 If this bhajan filled your heart with bhakti, please like, share, and subscribe to Sanatan Music for more Hanuman bhajans, Ram bhajans, and devotional songs.

This song beautifully shows the deep love of Hanuman ji for Shri Ram — where the name of Ram is sung, Hanuman is always present with devotion, strength, and divine joy.

This Hanuman bhajan is perfect for morning devotion, Tuesday/Saturday puja, Ram bhakti gatherings, satsang, festive playlists, workout motivation, or anytime you want to fill your space with high-energy bhakti.

snippet.title: मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
snippet.description:
#radha #radharani #radhakrishna
#radha #radharani #radhakrishna #radhabhajan #bhajanlyrics #krishnabhajan 
 
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा |Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko|Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan#radha 
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan


मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

Song: मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan


Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ। Palak  Bhakti आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

📌 Keywords: Mohe Mor Banaiyo To Banaiyo Vrindavan Ko, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan, Vrindavan Bhajan, Radha Krishna Song 2026, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Krishna Meditation Music, Radha Rani Bhajan, Braj Bhakti Song

#RadhaRadha

snippet.title: Palki Mein Hoke Sawar Chali Re - Lyrical | Alka Yagnik | Madhuri Dixit | Khal Nayak | 90's Songs
snippet.description:
Palki Mein Hoke Sawar Chali Re - Lyrical | Alka Yagnik | Madhuri Dixit | Khal Nayak | 90's Songs 

Song Credits :
Song: Palki Mein Hoke Sawar Chali Re
Singer(s): Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi

Movie Cast & Crew:
Movie Name : Khal Nayak (1993)
Producer: Subhash Ghai
Director: Subhash Ghai
Cast: Sanjay Dutt, Jackie Shroff, Madhuri Dixit, Raakhee, Anupam Kher

Lyrics:

Koi Rok Sake To Rok Le Main Naachati
Chhan Chhan Chhan Chhan Chhan

Paalki Mein Hoke Sawar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re
Paalki Mein Hoke Savaar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re

Koi Rok Sake To Rok Le Main Naachati
Chhan Chhan Chhan Chhan Chhan

Paalki Mein Hoke Savaar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re

Mushkil Se Maine Ye Din Nikaale
Mushkil Se Maine Ye Din Nikaale
Chalte Tez Chal Tu O Gaadi Waale

Mann Mein Lagi Hai Aisi Lagan
Aisi Lagan Haaye Aisi Lagan

Hoke Main Badi Bekaraar Chali Re
Hoke Main Badi Bekaraar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re
Paalki Mein Hoke Savaar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re

Ho Jaaungi Main Jal Jal Ke Mitti
Maine Piya Ko Likh Di Hai Chitthi
Maine Piya Ko Likh Di Hai Chitthi

Tu Na Aa Tu Na Aa Main Aa Rahi Hoon
Sajan Sajan Sajan

Kar Kar Ke Main Intezaar Chali Re
Kar Kar Ke Main Intezaar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re
Paalki Mein Hoke Savaar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re

Ye Sona Ye Chaandi Ye Heere Ye Moti
Ho Sainya Bina Sainya Bina Sab Kuch Hai
Naam Ka, Naam Ka, Naam Ka
Naam Ka, Naam Ka

Ye Mera Joban Joban Joban
Ye Mera Joban Kis Kaam Ka, Kis Kaam Ka
Ghoonghat Mein Jale
Kab Tak Birahan, Birahan, Birahan, Birahan

Main Sir Se Chunari Utaar Chali Re
Main Sir Se Chunari Utaar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re

Koi Rok Sake To Rok Le Main Naachati
Chhan Chhan Chhan Chhan Chhan

Paalki Mein Hoke Sawar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re
Paalki Mein Hoke Sawar Chali Re
Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re

bn.title: দো ভাই দোনো তবাহি! গডলাইক এবং ফাইনালে উঠুন
bn.description:
📷 ইনস্টাগ্রাম - https://www.instagram.com/mrspike10/

ডিসকর্ডে আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন 👇
https://discord.com/invite/2pejjUbCKj

▶️ দ্বিতীয় চ্যানেল - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCasVrVp-Lr0ynmxFeXRG3oQ

📧mrspikeinquiry@gmail.com

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

✅কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহারের ক্ষেত্রে ফেয়ার ইউজের (ন্যায্য ব্যবহার) পাল্লা ভারী থাকে।

✅ভিডিও গেম ডিসক্লেইমার: এই ভিডিওর বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক ব্যবহারের জন্য। গেমপ্লেটি হলো Battlegrounds Mobile India (BGMI) নামক একটি ভিডিও গেম এবং এটি একটি কাল্পনিক সৃষ্টি।

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
✅যারা আমার ভিডিও দেখেন, লাইক, শেয়ার এবং কমেন্ট করেন, তাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ। আপনাদের কাছে এটি হয়তো একটি ছোট বিষয় মনে হতে পারে, কিন্তু আমি আপনাদের প্রত্যেককে আন্তরিকভাবে ধন্যবাদ জানাই। আপনাদের দেওয়া সমস্ত মতামত এবং মন্তব্যই আমাদের চ্যানেলকে আজকের এই পর্যায়ে নিয়ে আসতে সাহায্য করেছে।
তাই আবারও, আপনাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ!!! 😍

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

snippet.title: REAL STRUGGLE (Official Music Video) | Dharampreet & Kuldeep Rasila | New Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
LUCKY MANILA & KULDEEP RASILA PRESENTS

🎬 REAL STRUGGLE – Official Music Video


Life is not always easy. Behind every smile, every dream, and every success, there is a story of sacrifice, pain, hard work, and struggle. “REAL STRUGGLE” is a Punjabi track dedicated to those people who keep fighting their battles silently and never give up.
This song reflects the reality of life, emotions, and the journey that many people experience while chasing their dreams. If you have ever faced difficult times, this song is for you.


✨ Watch the full video and feel the emotion behind every word.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💫 Song Credits:
🎤 Singer: Dharampreet & Kuldeep Rasila
🎼 Music: Still Music
✍️ Lyrics: Kaka Mallwal
🎬 Director: Mehraaj Singh
✂️ Editor: Jeet Rowdy
🎥 Presentation: Lucky Manila & Kuldeep Rasila

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💥 Every struggle creates a stronger person.
💥 Every pain has a story.
💥 Every dream needs sacrifice.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

REAL STRUGGLE – A song from the heart ❤️
If you enjoyed this song then don’t forget to:
👍 Like
💬 Comment
📢 Share
🔔 Subscribe for more Punjabi songs & videos

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

snippet.description:
#NaganSiLugai #farmaninaaz i #terabalamchota #Naazmusic 

Song  - Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई 
Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla
Lyrics  - varunesh baisla , Anuj Mulheda 
Music - Gaurav Panchal (Gr Music -8708626865)

Label -   Naaz Music
Production - Rahul Mulheda
Special Thanks - Naaz Music And Team
For any query:- Email - farmaninaaz786@gmail.com

                 Lyrics
Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri


म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा
र म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा 

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

लाख लाख के सूट मै पहरू सवा लाख की जूती रे
चांदी का मेरा वायरल नाड़ा दिल्ली के मै कोठी र

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

यूपी के मै ढुंगा मारू हाले दिल्ली सारी री
दूर दूर त निगाह गड़ावे रांडे छेल जुहारी री
लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

दो बालका की मां बनगी मै लागू कती कवारी सी
ढुंगे मेरे झोल मार र चोटी नाग बनारी री
बीन ही बजा दू क्या

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

Lyrics:

Jeene ki hai tu hi vajah
Jeena tere liye
Main kya kahun ke yaar tu
Hai Kya Mere Liye

Zamane me kahin
Meri tarah kabhi
Chahega na koi
Tujhko

Jaise maine diya
Vaise poori tarah
Dil dega na koi
Tujhko

Tujhko..
Jab Se Mila..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Maana Jahan..
Tujhko..

Subah ki saari furtiyan
Bekhudi har shaam ki
Na ho tere saath mein
Toh meri kis kaam ki

Uthe jo mera har qadam
Tere sang shuruat me
Haath daale Haath me
Fiqr kya anjaam ki

Mujh mein zyaada ab tu hi hai
Jitna main hoon voh kyun hi hai
Kuch aisa kar main dhoondhoon bhi toh
Paun na khudh ko..

Tu hi toh aasman
Tu hi meri zameen 
Maana hai Zindagi
Tujhko..

Bin maange har dua
Poori hui meri
Paaya jo humnasheen
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Jab se mila..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Maana jahan..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..

Galatiyan bhi teri
Main gawara karun
Ye khata hi sahi, par dobara karun

Kya karun sarphira
Ishq hi hai mera
Izhaar ka yahi tareeqa hai mera..

Aankhon ki hai tu raushni
Tu hi toh khaab hai
Main hoon agar savaal toh
Tu hi jawaab hai..

➟Live Electric Guitar & Bass : John Paul

Lyrics:

Jeene ki hai tu hi vajah
Jeena tere liye
Main kya kahun ke yaar tu
Hai Kya Mere Liye

Zamane me kahin
Meri tarah kabhi
Chahega na koi
Tujhko

Jaise maine diya
Vaise poori tarah
Dil dega na koi
Tujhko

Tujhko..
Jab Se Mila..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Maana Jahan..
Tujhko..

Subah ki saari furtiyan
Bekhudi har shaam ki
Na ho tere saath mein
Toh meri kis kaam ki

Uthe jo mera har qadam
Tere sang shuruat me
Haath daale Haath me
Fiqr kya anjaam ki

Mujh mein zyaada ab tu hi hai
Jitna main hoon voh kyun hi hai
Kuch aisa kar main dhoondhoon bhi toh
Paun na khudh ko..

Tu hi toh aasman
Tu hi meri zameen 
Maana hai Zindagi
Tujhko..

Bin maange har dua
Poori hui meri
Paaya jo humnasheen
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Jab se mila..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Maana jahan..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..

Galatiyan bhi teri
Main gawara karun
Ye khata hi sahi, par dobara karun

Kya karun sarphira
Ishq hi hai mera
Izhaar ka yahi tareeqa hai mera..

Aankhon ki hai tu raushni
Tu hi toh khaab hai
Main hoon agar savaal toh
Tu hi jawaab hai..

snippet.title: ENIGMA (Official Album) | Arjan Dhillon | Mxrci | Jay Trak | Arsh Heer | Latest Punjabi Songs 2026
snippet.description:
🔥 The wait is over! ENIGMA is finally here — a powerful musical experience by Punjabi music sensation Arjan Dhillon. This album brings together deep storytelling, luxury vibes, emotional moments, Punjabi culture, hustle mindset, and modern sound design in one complete package. With next-level production by Mxrci, Jay Trak, and Arsh Heer, every track carries its own unique energy and vibe.

From motivational anthems to emotional melodies, from luxury lifestyle vibes to heartfelt storytelling — ENIGMA proves once again why Arjan Dhillon continues to dominate Punjabi music listeners worldwide.

🎵 Tracklist – ENIGMA Album:
00:00 No Shortcut By Arjan Dhillon, Jay Trak
02:31 Enigma By Arjan Dhillon, Mxrci
05:32 Counting Gems By Arjan Dhillon, Mxrci
09:24 One Call Away By Arjan Dhillon, Jazzy B, Mxrci
11:45 Skyfull By Arjan Dhillon, Arsh Heer
16:25 420 Miles By Arjan Dhillon, Jay Trak
17:10 Me Vs Me By Arjan Dhillon, Mxrci
21:54 Ruthless By Arjan Dhillon, Mxrci
24:23 Better With Me By Arjan Dhillon, Mxrci
27:29 Culture By Arjan Dhillon, Mxrci
30:17 Mahila Mittar By Arjan Dhillon, Mxrci
32:48 Last Goodbye By Arjan Dhillon, Arsh Heer
36:17 Raw Rich Rare By Arjan Dhillon, Mxrci

✨ Whether you love emotional Punjabi songs, motivational music, luxury vibes, Punjabi culture, or modern sound — this album has something for every listener.

🎧 Artists & Credits:
🎤 Singer / Lyrics / Composer: Arjan Dhillon
🎼 Music: Mxrci, Jay Trak, Arsh Heer
🏷️ Label: Panj-aab Records

💬 Comment your favorite track from ENIGMA!
Which song is on repeat for you — Culture, Counting Gems, Skyfull, or Last Goodbye?

te.title: FC మొబైల్ లైవ్ - ప్రపంచపు గేమ్, UTOTS, మరియు ప్లేస్టైల్స్
te.description:
మేము 'ది వరల్డ్స్ గేమ్ అప్‌డేట్'ను ప్రారంభించడానికి సిద్ధమవుతున్నాము! FC మొబైల్ మే 28వ తేదీన 00:40 UTCకి నిర్వహణ పనుల కోసం మ్యాచ్‌మేకింగ్‌ను మూసివేస్తుంది, మరియు 00:55 UTC నుండి లాగిన్ తాత్కాలికంగా అందుబాటులో ఉండదు.

మీరు అప్‌డేట్ కోసం వేచి ఉన్నప్పుడు, 'ది వరల్డ్స్ గేమ్ టోర్నమెంట్', క్విక్ మ్యాచ్, ప్లేస్టైల్స్ మరియు UTOTS గురించిన తాజా సమాచారంతో సహా 'ది వరల్డ్స్ గేమ్ అప్‌డేట్' యొక్క ముందస్తు సంగ్రహావలోకనం కోసం మాతో చేరండి! పంచుకోవడానికి చాలా విషయాలు ఉన్నాయి, కాబట్టి ఈ అదనపు ప్రత్యేకమైన లైవ్ షో కోసం మాతో చేరండి!

Nell'attesa dell'aggiornamento, unitevi a noi per un'anteprima di "The World's Game", che include il Torneo "The World's Game", la Partita Veloce, i PlayStyles e le ultime novità su UTOTS! Abbiamo molto da condividere, quindi non mancate a questo speciale show LIVE!

Gioca ora! Italiano: https://fcmobile.sng.link/Dn1ol/fmnz

ta.title: FC Mobile நேரலை - உலகின் விளையாட்டு, UTOTS, மற்றும் PlayStyles
ta.description:
நாங்கள் 'தி வேர்ல்ட்ஸ் கேம் அப்டேட்'-ஐ வெளியிடத் தயாராகி வருகிறோம்! FC மொபைல், பராமரிப்புப் பணிகளுக்காக மே 28 அன்று 00:40 UTC மணிக்கு மேட்ச்மேக்கிங்கை மூடும், மேலும் 00:55 UTC முதல் லாகின் செய்வது தற்காலிகமாகக் கிடைக்காது.

நீங்கள் அப்டேட்டிற்காகக் காத்திருக்கும் வேளையில், 'தி வேர்ல்ட்ஸ் கேம் டோர்னமென்ட்', 'குவிக் மேட்ச்', 'பிளேஸ்டைல்ஸ்' மற்றும் UTOTS பற்றிய சமீபத்திய தகவல்கள் உள்ளிட்ட 'தி வேர்ல்ட்ஸ் கேம் அப்டேட்'-இன் முன்னோட்டத்திற்காக எங்களுடன் இணையுங்கள்! பகிர்வதற்கு நிறைய விஷயங்கள் உள்ளன, எனவே இந்த மிகவும் சிறப்பான நேரலை நிகழ்ச்சியில் எங்களுடன் இணையுங்கள்!

இப்போதே விளையாடுங்கள்! https://fcmobile.sng.link/Dn1ol/fmnz

pa.title: FC Mobile ਲਾਈਵ - ਦ ਵਰਲਡਜ਼ ਗੇਮ, UTOTS, ਅਤੇ ਪਲੇਅਸਟਾਈਲਜ਼ (PlayStyles)
pa.description:
ਅਸੀਂ ਦ ਵਰਲਡਜ਼ ਗੇਮ ਅੱਪਡੇਟ ਲਾਂਚ ਕਰਨ ਲਈ ਤਿਆਰ ਹੋ ਰਹੇ ਹਾਂ! FC ਮੋਬਾਈਲ 28 ਮਈ ਨੂੰ 00:40 UTC 'ਤੇ ਰੱਖ-ਰਖਾਅ ਲਈ ਮੈਚਮੇਕਿੰਗ ਬੰਦ ਕਰ ਦੇਵੇਗਾ, ਅਤੇ 00:55 UTC ਤੋਂ ਸ਼ੁਰੂ ਹੋ ਕੇ ਲੌਗਇਨ ਅਸਥਾਈ ਤੌਰ 'ਤੇ ਉਪਲਬਧ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੋਵੇਗਾ।

ਜਦੋਂ ਤੁਸੀਂ ਅੱਪਡੇਟ ਦੀ ਉਡੀਕ ਕਰ ਰਹੇ ਹੋ, ਤਾਂ ਦ ਵਰਲਡਜ਼ ਗੇਮ ਅੱਪਡੇਟ ਦੀ ਇੱਕ ਝਲਕ ਦੇਖਣ ਲਈ ਸਾਡੇ ਨਾਲ ਜੁੜੋ ਜਿਸ ਵਿੱਚ ਦ ਵਰਲਡਜ਼ ਗੇਮ ਟੂਰਨਾਮੈਂਟ, ਕੁਇੱਕ ਮੈਚ, ਪਲੇਸਟਾਈਲ ਅਤੇ UTOTS 'ਤੇ ਨਵੀਨਤਮ ਸ਼ਾਮਲ ਹਨ! ਸਾਂਝਾ ਕਰਨ ਲਈ ਬਹੁਤ ਕੁਝ ਹੈ, ਇਸ ਲਈ ਇਸ ਵਾਧੂ ਵਿਸ਼ੇਸ਼ ਲਾਈਵ ਸ਼ੋਅ ਲਈ ਸਾਡੇ ਨਾਲ ਜੁੜੋ!

ਹੁਣੇ ਖੇਡੋ! https://fcmobile.sng.link/Dn1ol/fmnz

ml.title: FC Mobile ലൈവ് - ദി വേൾഡ്സ് ഗെയിം, UTOTS, കൂടാതെ പ്ലേസ്റ്റൈലുകൾ
ml.description:
ദി വേൾഡ്സ് ഗെയിം അപ്‌ഡേറ്റ് സമാരംഭിക്കാൻ ഞങ്ങൾ തയ്യാറെടുക്കുകയാണ്! മെയ് 28-ന് 00:40 UTC-ന് FC മൊബൈൽ മാച്ച് മേക്കിംഗ് അറ്റകുറ്റപ്പണികൾ അവസാനിപ്പിക്കും, 00:55 UTC മുതൽ ലോഗിൻ താൽക്കാലികമായി ലഭ്യമാകില്ല.

അപ്‌ഡേറ്റിനായി കാത്തിരിക്കുമ്പോൾ, ദി വേൾഡ്സ് ഗെയിം ടൂർണമെന്റ്, ക്വിക്ക് മാച്ച്, പ്ലേസ്റ്റൈലുകൾ, UTOTS-ലെ ഏറ്റവും പുതിയത് എന്നിവയുൾപ്പെടെ ദി വേൾഡ്സ് ഗെയിം അപ്‌ഡേറ്റിന്റെ ഒരു ലഘു നിരീക്ഷണത്തിനായി ഞങ്ങളോടൊപ്പം ചേരൂ! പങ്കിടാൻ ധാരാളം കാര്യങ്ങളുണ്ട്, അതിനാൽ ഈ പ്രത്യേക ലൈവ് ഷോയ്ക്കായി ഞങ്ങളോടൊപ്പം ചേരൂ!

ഇപ്പോൾ കളിക്കൂ! https://fcmobile.sng.link/Dn1ol/fmnz

snippet.title: HAMDAM (Official Music Video) - Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam, HarisSaleem, Zakariya
snippet.description:
“Between prayers and memories, there lives a Hamdam”.

Celebrate this Bakrid with "HAMDAM," a grand audio-visual anthem from Aachus Production that beautifully bridges traditional festive warmth with modern global sounds to deliver a powerful message of peace, love, and togetherness.

Composed and performed by Hesham Abdul Wahab, the track features the soulful vocals of Hanan Shaah, moving Malayalam lyrics by Shafi Kollam, and an energetic English rap verse by veteran artist Haris Saleem (Street Academics). Bringing this melody to life on screen is award-winning filmmaker Zakariya in his music video directorial debut, transforming "HAMDAM" into a stunning, cinematic celebration of community.

Listen to HAMDAM: https://tuneabl.com/stream-hamdam

Music Credits:
Song Composed, Arranged and produced by Hesham Abdul wahab 
Singers: Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam
Rap performed and written by Haris Saleem (Street Academics) 
Additional Vocals: Ayshath Safa and Vichuuuh

Bouzouki, Mandolin, Oud, Rabab, Saz: Tapas Roy 
Bulbul: Kishore Mohite 
Guitars and Bass: Sumesh Parameswar 
Live Rhythms & Percussions conducted & designed by Dipesh Varma 
Dholak, Ghungroo Tabla & Tabla: Ratnadeep Jamsandekar, Vijay Jadhav 
Percussions: Ratnadeep Jamsandekar, Pratik Tapase 
Rhythms Recorded by Kittu Meykal assisted by Vivek at Soundideaz Studios, Mumbai 
Mixed and Mastered by Harishankar V at Aural Alchemy Kochi 
Mix Assisted by Santom Jose & Azhar Thaju 
Recording Studios: HW Studio - Kochi, Soundideaz Studios - Mumbai, NeoSound Studio - Mumbai 
Recording Engineers - Pranjal and Hesham 
Vocal Edits: Shyam Lal at Blac N Bron Studio, Kozhikode
HW Sessions Managed by Vichuuuh Praboa. 
Artist Management: Kishor Chokappan 

Audio Digital Partner: TUNE.ABL
Tune.Abl Team: Irfan Erooth, Ashbin Paulson 

Special Thanks to Ayshath Safa 
 
Video Credits:
Story & Director: Zakariya Mohammed
Cast: Noorudheen Ali Ahmed, Afeef, Aadhi, Hanan Shaah, Hesham Abdul Wahab, Shafi Kollam
Cinematographer: Kannan Patteri
Editor & VFX: Nizam Kadiry
Production Designer: Anees Nadodi

Costume Courtesy: House of Messcal
Line Production: Shamsudheen Makarathodi
Make Up: Rabeesh Babu P
Stills: Ihsan Bin Siraj
Choreographer: Imthiyas Aboobacker
Designs: Thwaha Ameen
Associate Director: Nizam Kadiry
Direction Team: Satid Muzammil, Ameen Ahsen, Shinihas
Associate Cinematographer: Shan Hafsa Ali
Associate Editor: Ameen Ahsen 
Art Director: Ehthishan Ali
Costume Associates: Kavitha, Syana Fathima Kajha

Assistant Cinematograopher: Abijith

Chief: Santhosh
Console: Sajeesh

DI Colorist: Sujieth Sivadasan (Action Frames Media)
DI Conformist: Praveen
Drone: Faijas Hassan
BTS: Kenz, Shahabas, Ameen Afsal
Choreo Assistants: Arjun, Jishnu
Production Team: Vahid Pookattiry, Amana Rahma, Mohsin Music, Ameen Afsal, Baheej, Ameen
Costume Assistants: Shijil Kumar, Sreejusha
Sticher: Bineesh Reveendran
Stiching Assistant: Shibu
Driver: Nikhil Raj V
Painters: Likesh, Sanu
Art Assistants: Nithin Raj, Fidha Sherin, Shyam Mohan, Akshim, Abrin Benoy
Designer: Noufa Shabeer
Carpenters: Suresh, Nithin, Ajith
Location Manager: Nasrulla Vazhakkad
Kids: Emin Ilan, Shazad, Emin Kadiry, Roya, Iffah Fathima, Azlan Ali, Aysha Ishwa, Ayaan, Alan Nash, Femiz, Eva, Feba Basi, Mishel Ibrahim, Haya Fathima, Alha Nourin, Aman, Azmin, Ahammed Razi, Ihan Abdul Sathar

- - - - - - - - - -

Lyrics:
Aalamin Noorala
Aayoree Ponpira
Souminte Thoufayayi
Shawwal Vannitha
Paraaake Thakbeerayi
Shukur Sheelukal

Ee Perunal Ee Perunal
Irayonekum Eidin Haal

Ummathe Musthafa
Thedalil Ee Kripa
Jannathin Chelitha
Ahalore Cherkkunee
Khalb Hubbilu

Ee Perunal Ee Perunal
Irayonekum Eidin Haal

Haqqayathonnalle
Dikkethumavanille
Okkeyum Porulalle
Nikkatha Nooralle
Kittabakathalle
Thakkol Meemalle
Thirayunna Neralle
Thiriyathe Povalle

Kadalinte Oolangal
Katha Chollum Ee Yathrayeee

Kadalinte Aazham Kadannu 
Muthonneduth Poranam
Ath Ninte Roohinte Sirr 
Marayunnidath Mochanam
Praanante Naathane 
Sarwa Saanthwanam

Celebrate, celebrate  feel the joy inside,
Side by side, let the good vibes ride.
Unity strong, bringing hearts together,
Eid day love gonna last forever.
Celebrate, celebrate  smiles everywhere,
Peace in the air like a whispered prayer.
From home to home let the kindness flow,
This is the light that we all can show.

Haqqayathonnalle
Dikkethumavanille
Okkeyum Porulalle
Nikkatha Nooralle

Ithayam Nirayum Muhabbin Kol
Kasavin Azhakil Kissayum Chel

Welcome to our Tamil Devotional Channel, your ultimate destination for soulful and uplifting Tamil devotional songs. Dive into the divine with our carefully curated collections designed to inspire and bring peace to your soul every day of the week.

Daily Devotional Songs:
* Monday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Tuesday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Wednesday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Thursday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Friday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Saturday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Sunday Tamil Devotional Songs

Special Devotional Collections:
* Shiva Tamil Devotional Songs: Celebrate the power and grace of Lord Shiva.
* Vishnu Tamil Devotional Songs: Immerse in the blessings of Lord Vishnu.
* Muruga Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke the valor and blessings of Lord Muruga.
* Hanuman Tamil Devotional Songs: Feel the strength and devotion of Lord Hanuman.
* Amman Tamil Devotional Songs: Honor the divine mother in her various forms.
* Saibaba Tamil Devotional Songs: Seek the blessings of Shirdi Sai Baba.
* Balaji Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship Lord Venkateswara with these soulful songs.
* Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Attract prosperity with hymns for Goddess Lakshmi.
* Devi Tamil Devotional Songs: Praise the supreme goddess Devi in her many avatars.
* Ganesh Tamil Devotional Songs: Start your day with prayers to Lord Ganesha.

Special Occasions and Deities:
* Amavasai Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs for the new moon day rituals.
* Pradosham Tamil Devotional Songs: Hymns for the auspicious Pradosham period.
* Ashta Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs dedicated to the eight forms of Goddess Lakshmi.
* Vinayagar Tamil Devotional Songs: Devotions for the remover of obstacles, Lord Vinayagar.
* Ganapathi Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke blessings from Lord Ganapathi.
* Surya Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship the Sun God, Surya, with these melodies.
* Sani Tamil Devotional Songs: Appease Lord Sani with these devotional tracks.
* Guru Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs to honor Guru and seek his wisdom.
* Perumal Tamil Devotional Songs: Devote to Lord Perumal with these spiritual songs.
* Navagraha Tamil Devotional Songs: Balance your energies with songs for the nine planets.

Subscribe now and join our spiritual journey. Like, share, and hit the bell icon to stay updated with our latest devotional uploads. May these divine songs bring peace, prosperity, and positivity to your life.

Welcome to our Tamil Devotional Channel, your ultimate destination for soulful and uplifting Tamil devotional songs. Dive into the divine with our carefully curated collections designed to inspire and bring peace to your soul every day of the week.

Daily Devotional Songs:
* Monday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Tuesday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Wednesday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Thursday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Friday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Saturday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Sunday Tamil Devotional Songs

Special Devotional Collections:
* Shiva Tamil Devotional Songs: Celebrate the power and grace of Lord Shiva.
* Vishnu Tamil Devotional Songs: Immerse in the blessings of Lord Vishnu.
* Muruga Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke the valor and blessings of Lord Muruga.
* Hanuman Tamil Devotional Songs: Feel the strength and devotion of Lord Hanuman.
* Amman Tamil Devotional Songs: Honor the divine mother in her various forms.
* Saibaba Tamil Devotional Songs: Seek the blessings of Shirdi Sai Baba.
* Balaji Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship Lord Venkateswara with these soulful songs.
* Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Attract prosperity with hymns for Goddess Lakshmi.
* Devi Tamil Devotional Songs: Praise the supreme goddess Devi in her many avatars.
* Ganesh Tamil Devotional Songs: Start your day with prayers to Lord Ganesha.

Special Occasions and Deities:
* Amavasai Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs for the new moon day rituals.
* Pradosham Tamil Devotional Songs: Hymns for the auspicious Pradosham period.
* Ashta Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs dedicated to the eight forms of Goddess Lakshmi.
* Vinayagar Tamil Devotional Songs: Devotions for the remover of obstacles, Lord Vinayagar.
* Ganapathi Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke blessings from Lord Ganapathi.
* Surya Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship the Sun God, Surya, with these melodies.
* Sani Tamil Devotional Songs: Appease Lord Sani with these devotional tracks.
* Guru Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs to honor Guru and seek his wisdom.
* Perumal Tamil Devotional Songs: Devote to Lord Perumal with these spiritual songs.
* Navagraha Tamil Devotional Songs: Balance your energies with songs for the nine planets.

Subscribe now and join our spiritual journey. Like, share, and hit the bell icon to stay updated with our latest devotional uploads. May these divine songs bring peace, prosperity, and positivity to your life.

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: घर में चलाओ ये सुंदरकांड पाठ 🏡 सारी परेशानियां दूर होंगी | Full Path -Sampurn Sunderkand
snippet.description:
घर में चलाओ ये सुंदरकांड पाठ 🏡 सारी परेशानियां दूर होंगी | Full Path -Sampurn Sunderkand

Album :- Sampurn Sunderkand
Song :-  Sampurn Sunderkand
Singer :- Ravi Raj 
Lyrics :- Dinesh Railhan 
Music :- Railhan Studios 
Recording - Kailash Ji 
Makeup - Shivu Makeovers 
Director - Vivek Singh
Digital Partner : Lokdhun 
Label / Company :- Bhakti Dhaam 
VG - 44632

Spotify -  https://open.spotify.com/album/1rAHzMZye5CFjUII4NKB5l
Instagram -    https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1218369780381010/
Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/sampurn-sunderkand-2688-7175
Jio Saavan - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/sampurn-sunderkand/Oz4-SytYVn0
Apple - https://music.apple.com/in/album/sampurn-sunderkand/1876480389?i=1876480391
Amazon -  https://music.apple.com/in/album/sampurn-sunderkand/1876480389?i=1876480391
YT Music -  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=meKYP8Q6aAY 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

सुन्दरकांड” – श्री राम चरित मानस का 5 वा अध्याय/कांड है। सुन्दर कांड (Sundar Kand) को सबसे पहले रामायण में श्री वाल्मीकि जी ने संस्कृत में लिखा था। बाद में तुलसी दस जी ने जब श्री राम चरित मानस लिखी, तो सुन्दर कांड का अवधी भाषा वाला रूप हम सब के सामने आया 
सुन्दरकाण्ड में हनुमान जी का सीता माता को खोजने के लिए की गयी लंका यात्रा का सम्पूर्ण मनमोहक बखान किया गया है।
सुन्दरकांड एक ऐसा भाग है जो सिर्फ हनुमान जी की वीरता का बखान करता है । सुन्दर कांड हनुमान जी पर केंद्रित सबसे पुरानी रचना है। ऐसा माना जाता है के सुन्दरकाण्ड के पाठ से सभी मनोकामनाएं पूर्ण होती हैं ।

सुन्दर कांड के फायदे | Benefits of - Sunder Kand
 यह कहा जाता है कि चालीस सप्ताह तक लगातार जो कोई श्रद्धापूर्वक Sundarkand का पाठ करता है, तो उसके सभी मनोरथ पूरे होते हैं तथा जीवन के सभी कष्ट, दुःख, परेशानियाँ दूर हो जाती हैँ । कई ज्योतिषी भी विपरित परिस्थितियों में सुंदरकांड करने की ही सलाह देते हैं। यदि किसी व्यक्ति के जीवन में अत्यधिक परेशानियां हो तथा कोई काम नहीं बन पा रहा है, आत्मविश्वास की कमी हो तो सुंदरकांड के पाठ से शुभ फल प्राप्त होता है।

सुन्दरकांड” – श्री राम चरित मानस का 5 वा अध्याय/कांड है। सुन्दर कांड (Sundar Kand) को सबसे पहले रामायण में श्री वाल्मीकि जी ने संस्कृत में लिखा था। बाद में तुलसी दस जी ने जब श्री राम चरित मानस लिखी, तो सुन्दर कांड का अवधी भाषा वाला रूप हम सब के सामने आया 
सुन्दरकाण्ड में हनुमान जी का सीता माता को खोजने के लिए की गयी लंका यात्रा का सम्पूर्ण मनमोहक बखान किया गया है।
सुन्दरकांड एक ऐसा भाग है जो सिर्फ हनुमान जी की वीरता का बखान करता है । सुन्दर कांड हनुमान जी पर केंद्रित सबसे पुरानी रचना है। ऐसा माना जाता है के सुन्दरकाण्ड के पाठ से सभी मनोकामनाएं पूर्ण होती हैं ।

గోవింద నామాలు వింటే మీ అప్పులు తీరి సంపద పెరుగుతుంది | Govinda Namalu | Venkateshwara Govinda Namalu 

Listening to Govinda Namalu is believed to bring the divine blessings of Lord Venkateswara Swamy into your life. This powerful devotional chanting helps remove financial problems, clears debts, and attracts wealth and prosperity. Regular listening of Venkateshwara Govinda Namalu creates a peaceful mind, strengthens faith, and fills the home with positive energy and spiritual vibrations. 

#govindanamalu 
#govindanamalutelugu 
#govindanamaluwithlyrics 
#TeluguBhaktiSongs #TeluguDevotionalSongs

snippet.title: Gup Chup Gup Chup -Karan Arjun Movie | Alka Yagnik, Ila Arun | Salman Khan, Shahrukh Khan, Kajol
snippet.description:
Song Credits :
Singer(s) : Ila Arun, Alka Yagnik
Music Director : Rajesh Roshan
Lyricist : Indeevar

Movie Cast & Crew :
Producer : Rakesh Roshan
Director : Rakesh Roshan
Cast : Salman Khan, Shahrukh Khan, Kajol, Mamta Kulkarni, Raakhee, Amrish Puri

Song Lyrics :

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup 
Laamba Laamba Ghoonghat Kaahe Ko Daala
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Laamba Laamba Ghoonghat Kaahe Ko Daala
Kya Kaheen Kar Aayi Tu Munh Kaala Re 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Kaanon Mein Batiyaan Karti Hain Sakhiyaan 
Raat Kiya Re Tune Kaisa Ghotala 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Main Tanne Samajh Kar So Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Main Tanne Samajh Kar So Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Vo Bahanoi Tha Bahanoi Thahara 
Kyon Na Pahachaana Toone Piya Ji Ka Chehara 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Bahanoi Ne Odh Rakhi Thi Chaadar
Rakhi Thi Chaadar Rakhi Thi Chaadar
Main Samajhi Piya Ka Hai Bistar
Piya Ka Hai Bistar Piya Ka Hai Bistar
Aadhe Bistar Pe Vo Soya Tha
Aadhe Pe Main So Gai 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata Toh Hoga
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata To Hoga
Chhitaki To Hogi Chhat Pe Chandaniya 
Apano Paraayo Nazar Na Aayo 
Bhool Kaise Ho Gai Tujhase Dulariya
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Bhool Hui Mujhase To Kaisa Achambha
Kaisa Achambha Kaisa Achambha
Bahanoi Tha Piya Jitana Lamba
Piya Jitana Lamba Piya Jitana Lamba
Choor Thi Main Din Bhar Ki Thakan Se 
Padate Hi Bistar Pe So Gai 
Mujhko Raanaji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhko Raanaji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Soch Rahe The Ham Sab Jaisa
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Toone Kiya Nahi Kuch Vaisa 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Mukhade Pe Tere Sach Ka Ujaala 
Raat Kiya Nahi Munh Toone Kaala 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

#GupChupGupChup #KaranArjun #MamtaKulkarni #AlkaYagnik #IlaArun #RajeshRoshan

bn.title: ROBLOX-এ ব্রেইন রটের জন্য লিলি প্যাডে লাফ দিন!!
bn.description:
রোবলক্সে মাথা খারাপ করার জন্য লিলিপ্যাড লাফান!!

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে “ন্যায্য ব্যবহার”-এর অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত এমন একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

snippet.title: Rebuilding LAMBORGHINI AVENTADOR to WORLD's FASTEST CAR! 🔥 Forza Horizon 6 | LOGITECH G29
snippet.description:
Rebuilding an OLD Lamborghini Aventador into a BRAND NEW 3090HP MONSTER in Forza Horizon 6 using Logitech G29! 🔥

In this video, I do a full rebuild/restoration, max upgrades & tuning, then take the Aventador for a top speed + acceleration test and a final race/drive. If you love Lamborghini rebuilds, crazy horsepower builds, wheel gameplay and satisfying transformations, this one is for you!

Watch till the end for the final build + speed run! 🤑

Video Highlights
Full Aventador rebuild: Old to brand new
Max upgrades + tuning (3090HP)
Top speed / drag / highway test
Logitech G29 steering wheel gameplay (realistic driving)

In this video, I do a full rebuild/restoration, max upgrades & tuning, then take the Aventador for a top speed + acceleration test and a final race/drive. If you love Lamborghini rebuilds, crazy horsepower builds, wheel gameplay and satisfying transformations, this one is for you!

Watch till the end for the final build + speed run! 🤑

Video Highlights
Full Aventador rebuild: Old to brand new
Max upgrades + tuning (3090HP)
Top speed / drag / highway test
Logitech G29 steering wheel gameplay (realistic driving)

snippet.title: एकादशी भजन - ग्यारस उसी के घर में जावेगी, जहां लगा पेड़ तुलसी का | Ekadashi Bhajan | Gyaras Bhajan
snippet.description:
🌿✨ग्यारस उसी के घर में जावेगी, जहां लगा पेड़ तुलसी का | Ekadashi Bhajan | FINE DIGITAL HARYANVI✨🌿
(Gyaras Usi Ke Ghar Mein Javegi Jaha Laga Ped Tulsi Ka

🙏 प्रस्तुत है एक बेहद मधुर और भक्तिमय एकादशी भजन — “जहां लगा पेड़ तुलसी का”, जिसमें बताया गया है कि जहाँ तुलसी का पौधा होता है, वहाँ स्वयं लक्ष्मी जी, भगवान विष्णु और सभी देवी-देवताओं की कृपा बनी रहती है। यह भजन भक्ति, श्रद्धा और आध्यात्मिक शांति से भरपूर है।

Song Info :-
■ Title ▹Gyaras Usi Ke Ghar Me Javegi Jaha Laga Ped Tulsi Ka
■ Artist ▹ Ritu
■ Singer ▹ Kiran Negi
■ Music ▹ Kuldeep Mali Aala
■ Keyboard Player ▹ Sachin Kamal 
■ Lyrics & Composition ▹Traditional
■ Song Production Support ▹Rajesh Madina
■ Editing ▹Max Ranga
■ Cameraman ▹Gulshan Bawa
■ Label ▹Fine Digital Video
■ Copyright ▹Fine Digital Media

Special Thanks To All Team

🎶 इस भजन में आपको मिलेगा:
✨ तुलसी माता का महत्व
✨ एकादशी व्रत की महिमा
✨ भगवान विष्णु और लक्ष्मी जी की कृपा
✨ भक्ति रस में डूबा हुआ सुंदर कीर्तन

💚 अगर आपको यह भजन पसंद आए तो LIKE 👍 जरूर करें,
💬 COMMENT करके बताएं आपको कैसा लगा,
🔔 और चैनल FINE DIGITAL HARYANVI को SUBSCRIBE करना न भूलें नीचे दिए हुए लिंक पे
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClwM5RNjqRRnAf1CGBEe_8g?sub_confirmation=1

📌 हर एकादशी पर ऐसे ही भक्ति भजन सुनने के लिए जुड़े रहें हमारे साथ।

snippet.title: Tera Yaar Rakane 2 (Official Music Video) | Shree Brar | Gurlez Akhtar | Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Shree Brar is back with the massive sequel to his smash hit Tera Yaar Rakane 2 🔥
This high-stakes track brings raw attitude, power, and dominance. Featuring the powerhouse Gurlez Akhtar, she delivers the perfect reply to match the track's alpha energy. Packed with heavy, hard-hitting beats by Avvy Sra and sharp and gritty lyrics by Shree Brar.

🎧 To Stream & Download Tera Yaar Rakane 2 Song:-

♫ Spotify: https://shreebrar.bfan.link/tera-yaar-rakane-2/spotify
♫ Apple Music: https://shreebrar.bfan.link/tera-yaar-rakane-2/appleMusic

♫ Amazon Music: https://shreebrar.bfan.link/tera-yaar-rakane-2/amazonMusic
♫ YouTube Music: https://shreebrar.bfan.link/tera-yaar-rakane-2/youtubeMusic

Credits:
Singer, Lyricist, Composer - Shree Brar 
Music - Mutant Beats
Mix Master - Guri 
Video - Shrii Films 
Project by - Samar Brar 
DOP - Kuran Dhillon 
Editing and Colourist - Yatin Arora 
Female Model -  Ravi Kaur Bal 
Poster by - Poster Perfecto 
Production - Rahul Kahlon Kawish 
Guest Appearance - Satvinder Chawla, Hardev Kalsi 
Special Thanks - MAAS Transport , Sunny Malhi, Rajat, Lovey, Lavi, Rana NZ, Jassi, Deep Malhi, Gurdarshan, Kahlon Bai and Shivam

Lyrics-
Mitra Tu Phone Ni Chakda,
Hun Ki Ae Fayda Nakhro,
Saade Ve Fire Mraate,
Kita C Vaada Nakhro.

Mundeya Ne Bhan Ti Toll Te,
Chitti Thodi Car Kude,
Mitra Ne Rakhta Manj Ke,
Velly Tera Yaar Kude.

Tutt Paneya Rakhta Ragad Ke,
Velly Tera Yaar Kude,
Chakla Hun Rakhta Maanj Ke.

Ve Lala Lala Hogi Mitra,
Koi Hath Na Begana Paave,
Ni Kehnde Ehnu 1315,
Hikka Dhed Di Footo Foot Jaave.

Je Pahla Pta Hunda Mitra,
Main Rakh Lendi Ohnu Jinde Kunde Laake,
Si Nava Nava Velly Utheya,
Tenu Keha C Bethu Ga Dhokha Khake.

Saada Kdo Kheda Chhdega,
Bolu Jide Paar Kude,
Mitra Ne Rakhta Manj Ke,
Velly Tera Yaar Kude.

Tutt Paneya Rakhta Ragad Ke,
Velly Tera Yaar Kude,

snippet.title: ভয়ংকর Thomas Train Vs Horror JCB Bus | Horror Train Attack | Indian Bike Driving 3D
snippet.description:
ভয়ংকর Thomas Train Vs Horror JCB Bus | Horror Train Attack | Indian Bike Driving 3D

এই ভিডিওতে দেখবে একদম insane horror fight যেখানে Thomas Train আর Horror JCB Bus এর মধ্যে শুরু হলো ভয়ংকর attack! 🚂💀🔥

Indian Bike Driving 3D horror mod এর ভিতরে শুরু হলো full action, destruction আর intense train chase gameplay! পুরো city জুড়ে চলবে chaos, dangerous crashes আর unexpected scary moments 😨

Thomas Train এর terrifying horror power আর Horror JCB Bus এর dangerous monster attack — দুইজনই একদম next level horror vehicle! 😱 কে জিতবে এই ভয়ংকর fight-এ? আর মানুষজন কি survive করতে পারবে এই deadly attack থেকে? 🤯

Horror Train Attack শুরু হওয়ার পর পুরো শহর পরিণত হবে disaster zone-এ! Thomas Train এর unstoppable speed আর Horror JCB Bus এর destructive power তৈরি করবে একদম epic horror showdown! 🔥🚂

শেষ পর্যন্ত দেখো কারণ ending-এ আছে একটা shocking twist! 🔥

👍 ভিডিওটা ভালো লাগলে অবশ্যই একটা LIKE দিও
